title: desmodium microphyllum var. macrocarpum
intro: Desmodium microphyllum var. macrocarpum, also known as Desmodium macrocarpum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Desmodium macrocarpum include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential in lowering cholesterol levels and regulating blood pressure. Desmodium macrocarpum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and roots are often used in various herbal preparations.
